fields.name: sort
fields.description: Sorting fields criteria and their associated priority and direction. Sorting priority is indicated by the order of the strings within the array. E.g. sort=title,size means that items are ordered by title and then, as a second ordering by size. A '-' sign before the search criteria indicates a descending ordering direction (Z to A), whereas no sign indicates a ascending direction (A to Z). E.g. sort=-title mean that the objects are ordered by title in reverse order (Z to A).

fields.name: links
fields.description: Links related to the returned object(s)
